title: Execution Model spec - implementation
Workflow is a named, versioned directed graph
Edge is a directed transition with deterministic selection inputs
State is a position in a run's progression
Transition is the full AlphaGo trace record
Outcome is the handler-produced node result + kind discriminator (coalesce)
Node type is one of five declared kinds
Agentic nodes carry a handler reference
Node carries handler-timeout, required-skills, and policy references
Node carries an idempotency-class tag
Idempotency-class default mapping by node role
Node carries four-axis tagging per architecture
Run executes one workflow against one input
Run ID propagates as commit trailer and event field
Bead-to-run relationship is many-runs-per-bead
Intra-run loops are not new runs
run_started emission on dispatch
run_completed and run_failed emission on terminal state
Terminal-state detection rule
Checkpoint is a git commit with work-product tree + transition-record sibling
Checkpoint commit carries structured trailers
Corrupted-checkpoint fallback rule
Transition record sibling file at canonical run-scoped path
Transition ID generation contract (daemon-local UUIDv7)
Transition record discoverable by git-show
Transition records are immutable
Audit tool detection rule for transition-record integrity
Large evidence payloads externalize under transition directory
Checkpoint schema is N-1 readable
Durable transition: one commit per durable transition + decision procedure (coalesce)
Git always knows the last durable state of every in-flight run
Branch-tip monotonicity check (vs external force-push / reset)
Failed transitions MUST NOT create checkpoint commits at MVH
Emission ordering: transition_event MUST NOT precede update-ref
Reconciliation workflows are an explicit exception to EM-023
Outcome spine: handler outcome threads through hook, gate, transition, event
Transition record is canonical durable form; transition_event is its projection
Transition event MUST NOT duplicate full trace payload
Consumers requiring full audit fidelity MUST read transition record from git
State reconstruction uses git plus Beads only
Active-run discovery at startup
Deterministic replay contract
No workflow-level transactionality
Sub-workflow node expands in place within parent run
Sub-workflow node-ID namespacing
Sub-workflow reference graph MUST be acyclic
Sub-workflow expansion pin durable on entry checkpoint
Parent run's checkpoint trail covers nested sub-workflow execution
Sub-workflow entry and exit emit lifecycle events
Sub-workflow terminal outcome is last-expanded-node's Outcome
Sub-workflow composition is the ONLY composition mechanism
Pre-run validator MUST run before any node executes
Validator is mechanism-tagged
Agents that generate DOT MUST run validation before submission
Deterministic edge-selection cascade + context-update ordering (coalesce)
Guards reorder; Gates permit/deny; otherwise edges follow EM-041
Gate-deny continuation protocol (gate-pending sub-state)
Cycle traversal cap + per-(run_id, edge) counter storage (coalesce)
Backtracking is transition_kind plus rollback_to_state_id
Rollback transitions are recorded as new transitions, not history-rewrites
Context restore is agent-scoped; does not alter graph state
No-matching-edge failure class is structural
RETRY outcome re-dispatch protocol
Sensor: git is the state-reconstruction source
Sensor: no subsystem implements workflow-level transactionality
Sensor: git wins on completion disagreement
